narrative:
Kingston Twp township has 2,005 registered voters, with 46.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.4 percentage points.
